name: WatchBot
tagline: Brand mention monitoring across social media
description: WatchBot scans Twitter, Reddit, and news for mentions of your brand. Get instant alerts and sentiment analysis. Perfect for PR teams and founders.

name: Email Triage Pro
tagline: Smart email sorting, labeling, and auto-replies
description: Tame your inbox with AI. Automatically categorize emails, draft responses, and flag priorities. Integrates with Gmail and Outlook.

name: ContentGen AI
tagline: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts and social content
description: AI-powered content creation tool that matches your voice. From blog articles to Twitter threads, create high-quality content in minutes.

name: Code Reviewer Bot
tagline: Automated code reviews, bug detection, and suggestions
description: Your personal code reviewer. Analyzes pull requests, finds bugs, and suggests improvements. Supports Python, JS, and more.

name: Finance Tracker AI
tagline: Track expenses, budgets, and get financial insights
description: Connect your bank accounts and get AI-powered insights on your spending. Set budgets, track investments, and receive personalized advice.

name: SupportBot Pro
tagline: AI-powered customer support agent for your website
description: Deploy a 24/7 AI support agent that handles common queries, escalates complex issues, and learns from your knowledge base.
